description:
GetCommandResponse is the structured output emitted by the "get" command
 when running in JSON output mode.

items.description: GetCommandResponseBridge describes a single bridge in the get command output.

deployment_name.description: The name of the bridge Deployment.

namespace.description: The namespace where the bridge is running.

source_deployment.description: The source deployment this bridge was cloned from.

source_namespace.description: The source namespace of the deployment.
